commitMessage: Phase80: patient record portability v1 (Health Summary first + share/download)
highlights: VistA-first: ORWRP REPORT TEXT primary, section RPCs fallback
AES-256-GCM encryption at rest with forward secrecy
10 API endpoints for export, download, share, revoke, audit
6 new audit actions for full traceability
E2E tests covering lifecycle, auth, validation
